description_long: This is a long, single-edged sword with a slightly curved, dark metallic blade that appears sharp and well-forged. The handle is elaborately designed, wrapped in green material with a prominent handguard and decorative elements, possibly resembling a dragon or serpent motif. The handguard is substantial and ornate, providing both protection and visual flair. The pommel and fittings are also green, matching the handle and adding to the cohesive aesthetic. The blade's surface has a matte, slightly textured finish, while the handle's wrapping appears to offer a secure grip. This sword is visually striking and would stand out in an urban environment, either as a display piece or a prop.
description: A long, curved sword with a dark blade and an ornate green-wrapped handle featuring decorative motifs and a prominent guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved blade and the detailed green handle with its decorative guard.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the thickness of the blade and the rounded, intricate handle design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade's curvature and the elaborate green handle with visible wrapping and guard.
description_view_3: Reverse end-on view focusing on the handle's shape and the blade's narrow profile.
attribute_handle_design: wrapped, green, contoured with decorative guard and pommel
attribute_ornamentation: decorative green motifs on handle and guard
